contract.payment_cadence: By ordering period (annually); NRE items are Not-to-Exceed
documents: drive://(1305M226D0012) Attachment 2-Schedule of Items and Prices_1305M226D0012.pdf

line_items.description: Black Swift S0 sUAS Platforms: 150 EA @ $18,000 (Period 1) + 150 EA @ $18,630 (Period 2) + 125 EA @ $19,282 (Period 3) + 125 EA @ $19,957 (Period 4) + 125 EA @ $20,655 (Period 5)

Mission Days Operational support (30 days x $2,850 per period x 5 periods) + Operational and Testing Support (6 EA x $6,000 per period x 5 periods) + Training Sessions (1 Operator/Observer @ $6,000 + 1 Instructor @ $600 per period x 5 periods)
Course Development: Operator and Observer Course ($6,000 per period x 5 periods) + Instructor Training Course ($6,000 per period x 5 periods)
Travel for Operational Support NTE: $50,000 NTE per ordering period x 5 periods

Non-recurring Engineering: Technical Documentation of Software and Hardware Development ($66,000 NTE per period x 5 periods) + Modeling ($66,000 NTE per period x 5 periods) + NHC Workflow Integration ($66,000 NTE per period x 5 periods) = $990,000 total NRE NTE
